mapper.select:
SELECT
i.interview_id AS interviewId, i.interview_datetime AS interviewDatetime,
e.employee_id AS employeeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName,
p.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName,
i.interview_type AS interviewTypeCode,
CASE i.interview_type
WHEN '01' THEN '対面' WHEN '02' THEN 'オンライン' WHEN '03' THEN '電話' ELSE '不明' END AS interviewTypeName,
u.user_id AS salesUserId, u.user_name AS salesUserName,
i.interview_status AS interviewStatusCode,
CASE i.interview_status WHEN '01' THEN '予定' WHEN '02' THEN '実施済み' WHEN '03' THEN '延期' WHEN '04' THEN 'キャンセル' ELSE '不明' END AS interviewStatusName
FROM interviews i
INNER JOIN employees e ON e.employee_id = i.employee_id
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.project_id = i.project_id
INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = i.sales_user_id
WHERE i.interview_datetime >=#{baseDatetime}
AND i.interview_status = '01'
AND i.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
AND i.sales_user_id = #{salesUserId}
ORDER BY i.interview_datetime ASC, i.interview_id ASC
